## `GIT_OPEN_LINKS`

> **Git Open Links Flag** &mdash; Open links from git remotes in `gitCommit`
> > **Type**: *Boolean* ‚ÄĘ **Category**: *Development*

Open links from git remotes in `gitCommit`
